role.title: Software Engineer
role.summary: Backend-focused engineer with experience across the stack: REST API design, microservices, and Domain-Driven Design. Currently a Computer Systems student at Aichi Institute of Technology (graduating May 2026), open to full-time opportunities in Japan and abroad.
role.lookingFor: Open to full-time backend / full-stack roles starting 2026.
